message:
feat(tui): add ComposeEnvelope for validated send dispatch (br-2bbt.17)

Add ComposeEnvelope struct and build_envelope() method to bridge the
compose panel with the async send_message path. Includes validation,
recipient extraction by kind (To/Cc/Bcc), and thread_id normalization.
Also fixes minor formatting from prior clippy pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
